# Documentation sync

Task: Update documentation for [topic]

Goal:
Bring canonical documentation in line with current repository behavior and workflow.

Source files to inspect first:
- [path]
- [path]

Scope:
- In scope: canonical docs related to the topic.
- Out of scope: unrelated documentation rewrites.

Constraints:
- Prefer canonical docs over temporary notes.
- Keep wording concise and specific.
- Flag stale docs outside scope.

Validation:
- Confirm updated docs match the referenced implementation or workflow.

Report back with:
- docs changed
- what was clarified or corrected
- stale docs needing follow-up
